changeSet.author: alexander.stanik@htw-berlin.de
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS REMSFAL.quotation_requests ( issue_id UUID, request_id UUID, project_id UUID, project_owner TEXT, project_care_of TEXT, project_billing_address_1 TEXT, project_billing_address_2 TEXT, project_billing_address_3 TEXT, initiator_id UUID, initiated_by TEXT, contractor_id UUID, contractor_name TEXT, organization_id UUID, scope_of_work TEXT, status TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP, modified_at TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (issue_id, request_id) ) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (request_id DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS quotation_requests_request_id_idx ON REMSFAL.quotation_requests (request_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS quotation_requests_organization_id_idx ON REMSFAL.quotation_requests (organization_id);
